about_item: Optimal Size & Capacity: Medium raised dog cot measuring 42"L x 30"W x 7"H (107x76x18 cm), with a robust structure that supports up to 100 pounds. Perfect for a normal adult German Shepherd, Golden Retriever, Akita etc.

Indestructible Design: Featuring a robust metal frame, durable Textilene fabric, and non-slip rubber feet. The edges are tightly enclosed within the frame, making it chew-proof and exceptionally long-lasting
Elevated Comfort: Raised 7 inches off the ground to promote airflow, keeping your pet cool, dry, and clean. Ideal for avoiding damp surfaces and providing a healthier resting environment
Effortless Cleaning: Pet hair and dirt won't cling to the tight mesh. Simply hose off with water or wipe with a damp towel for quick and easy maintenance

Simple Assembly & Portability: Includes screws and a hex tool, with some parts pre-assembled for quick setup. Perfect for indoor and outdoor use, picnics, camping, and training. Enjoy quality sleep on the go!

summary.text: Customers find the dog bed to be well-made, sturdy, and worth its price. The assembly process receives mixed feedback - while some find it easy to put together, others report issues with factory-threaded screws. The chew resistance feature also gets mixed reviews, with some finding it effective while others say it's not chew-proof.

authors_reviews.title: Fabulous dog bed 10/10
authors_reviews.text: I have a 7 year old165 pound Olde English Mastiff. This bed is a game changer. The older he gets the more difficult it gets for him to get up from the floor. This bed is extremely sturdy and the price is great. The first one that was delivered was missing 2 legs and they sent us the second one with no problem. It was also easy to assemble.
authors_reviews.author: Sally A. Jensen

authors_reviews.title: Excellent customer service
authors_reviews.text: I have a 10-pound miniature dachshund that has eaten every other dog bed in the house. So, I bought this bed since it claims to be chew proof. It is NOT. Otherwise, it seems to be of very good quality.The seller made it right for me!
authors_reviews.author: Julie A Anderson

authors_reviews.title: Good quality!
authors_reviews.text: I do recommend it, good quality, well made. Went together fairly easy until the last very last corner. I had to take a screw driver to pry it into place. Took a few tries but it worked, otherwise I would have given it a 5 star review.
authors_reviews.author: Karen

authors_reviews.title: Edges are all-enclosed with metal to prevent chewing
authors_reviews.text: Perfect for our 75 lb (large bed) lab. Easy to put together. The edges are all-enclosed with metal to prevent chewing for a great price.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Great product
authors_reviews.text: Really great dog bed, made well, reasonably priced & fast service. However, I have to return it because it is too small for my dog.
authors_reviews.author: rmoore

authors_reviews.title: Buyer beware!
authors_reviews.text: After exchanging our previous bed for the same reason- thinking it was just a one-off defect, the new one we got had the same problems: for one, the directions fail to mention that you have to provide your own Mr. Olympia if you want any chance of stretching the mesh fabric to meet both ends so that each side of the frame lines up square; which is attributed from the two longer side-rails being way too long (pictured for reference with two of the joints attached on one side). Two, the open non-sewed side was not forgiving at all in terms of assembly (and this is advertised as a "feature" to make it easier to remove the fabric for cleaning?) and needed two people to put on; one to keep the fabric taught while the other inched the rod slowly into the folded crease... a dog bed, of all things, shouldn't be this ardous to assemble. The customer service is doing a lot of heavy lifting in this review as they were prompt with sending my replacement. Regretfully, this dog bed is not for us.
authors_reviews.author: Alyssa T.

authors_reviews.title: Durable and as described
authors_reviews.text: Well worth it. Durable and as described. My super chewer enjoy this well built bed
authors_reviews.author: C.H.

authors_reviews.title: Very sturdy cot for dogs!
authors_reviews.text: This cot is fantastic. I have a chewy puppy about a year old and she destroys everything. This one she can’t get her mouth on it because it’s enclosed. I liked it so much I ordered another one.
authors_reviews.author: cavison
